description: A legacy sales system export has been loaded into the staging table STAGE_SALES_LEGACY. Create a PL/SQL stored procedure named MIGRATE_SALES_BULK in the HR schema to migrate this data to FACT_SALES_PROD. The implementation must utilize BULK COLLECT and FORALL ... SAVE EXCEPTIONS to handle partial failures, logging any invalid records (Sale ID and Error Message) to the MIGRATION_ERRORS table while committing all valid rows. A reference script is located on the Desktop.
